falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 3% with a volume surge exceeding 200% of the 14-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout invalidating the consolidation pattern and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The Blowoff Score surpasses 70 within 14 days while the price makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would signal extreme bullish momentum contradicting the current pattern's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank intervenes with a policy rate cut of 50 basis points or more during the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would invalidate the pattern's assumptions about market fundamentals

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
